name: Luks Kadife Ticaret ve Sanayi A.S.
summary: L√É¬ºks Kadife Ticaret ve Sanayi A.S. manufactures and sells velvet fabrics worldwide. It provides polyester, acrylic, cotton, viscose, and modal velvet for upholstery, drapery, and garment fabrics. The company was founded in 1972 and is based in Kayseri, Turkey.
